description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with a slender build, standing with arms extended horizontally. She has long, straight hair and wears a fitted, long-sleeve top featuring a spider web pattern and a large spider emblem on the chest and back. The top extends into a tunic-like length over a short skirt, paired with opaque leggings and knee-high boots. Her facial features are sharp and expressive, with a focused gaze. The overall appearance is reminiscent of a comic book or animated character, with bold outlines and simplified textures. The figure is designed to be visually striking and easily recognizable in an urban environment.
description: Stylized adult female figure in a spider-themed tunic, leggings, and boots, with long straight hair and expressive features. Comic-inspired design with bold outlines and simplified textures.
description_view_0: Front view shows the spider emblem on the chest, facial features, and full outfit details including tunic, leggings, and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the straight hair, and the side contour of the tunic and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the large spider emblem on the back, the flow of the hair, and the back of the boots and tunic.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, hair, and side details of the outfit and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve tunic with spider motif, short skirt, opaque leggings, knee-high boots
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair with center part
